popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description:
Biography

This profile is part of the Hamilton Name Study.

Claud (Hamilton) Hamilton First Lord Paisley is a member of Clan Hamilton.
Notables Project

zh.lifeSummary: 當Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley於1546年6月3日出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran27歲，母親Lady Margaret Douglas30歲。他和Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley至少有10個兒子和8個女兒。他在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利被列為baron of paisley。他去世於1621年5月3日之前在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Hamilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from what is now a deserted village in the parish of Barkby, Leicestershire. This is named from Old English hamel ‘crooked’ + dūn ‘hill’. Hamilton near Glasgow was founded by the English Hamiltons and named after them, and later bearers took their surname from the Scottish place. In the north of Ireland, where many Hamiltons settled in the 17th century, this surname may sometimes have been adopted for Hamill . It has also been adopted as an Anglicized form of southern Irish Ó hUrmholtaigh.

History: This name is borne by one of the most distinguished families of the Scottish nobility; they hold many titles, including marquessate and dukedom of Hamilton, the marquessate of Douglas, the dukedom of Abercorn, and the earldom of Haddington. They are descended from Walter FitzGilbert de Hameldone, a Norman baron who gave his support to Robert the Bruce in the 13th century. A member of this family was Sir William Hamilton (1730–1803), a British diplomat and archaeologist, whose wife, Lady Emma Hamilton (c. 1765–1815), became the mistress of Admiral Horatio Nelson. A branch of the family was established in Ireland by Sir Frederick Hamilton (died 1646), who served in the Swedish army of Gustavus Adolphus. He later became governor of Ulster, and his descendants were created viscounts Boyne. The family have given their name to Newtownhamilton and Hamiltonsbaron in County Armagh. Another branch of the family were to be found in Denmark, where Henrik Albertsen Hamilton (1588–1648) was a noted Latin poet. A 17th-century example of a Hamilton from Glasgow, Scotland, is recorded in the Netherlands, where the name is found in the form Hamelton. Another Scottish Hamilton, James, went to the West Indies in the 18th century and was the father of Alexander Hamilton (1755–1804), who arrived in NY in 1772 and became the first US secretary of the Treasury.

variants.name: Hamill
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Haineville or Henneville in Manche, France, named from the ancient Germanic personal name Hagano + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
English (Lancashire): nickname for a maimed person or someone with a distinctive scar, from Middle English, Old English hamel ‘mutilated, scarred’.
Irish (Ulster): according to MacLysaght, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁdhmaill ‘descendant of Ádhmall’, which he derives from ádhmall ‘active’.

nameMeanings.name: Claud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley was born on 3 June 1546, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran, was 27 and his mother, Lady Margaret Douglas, was 30. He had at least 10 sons and 8 daughters with Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley. His occupation is listed as baron of paisley in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died before 3 May 1621, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, and was buried in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley est né le 3 juin 1546, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Douglas, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles avec Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley. Sa profession de son indiquée est baron of paisley à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé avant 3 mai 1621, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley am 3. Juni 1546 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran 27 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Douglas 30. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als baron of paisley in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb vor 3. Mai 1621 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley è nato il il 3 giugno 1546 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, il suo padre, James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Douglas, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie con Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley. La sua occupazione è indicata come baron of paisley nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì prima del 3 maggio 1621, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley(이)가 1546년 6월 3일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Douglas(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 baron of paisley이었다. 그는 1621년 5월 3일 이전 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.3 June 1546–3 May 1621: 3 de junho de 1546–antes 3 de maio de 1621
pt.Elieston, Scotland or Linlithgow, West: Linlithgow, West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.Bangor, County Down, Northern Ireland, U: Bangor, County Down, Irlanda do Norte, United Kingdom
pt.Niddry Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland: Niddry Castle, West Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley nasceu em 3 de junho de 1546, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Douglas, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas com Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley. Sua profissão aparece como baron of paisley em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu antes 3 de maio de 1621, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.Niddry Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland: ниддри кастл, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley родился 3 июня 1546 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Douglas, 30. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley.  Он работал по профессии baron of paisley в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер перед 3 май 1621 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Claud Hamilton 1st Lord Paisley nació el 3 de junio de 1546, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, James Hamilton Duke of Chatellerault, Second Earl of Arran, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Douglas, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas con Lady Margaret Seton, Baroness Paisley. Su ocupación registrada era baron of paisley en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió antes de 3 de mayo de 1621, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
